commentary_links.hebrew: אֵ֣לֶּה הַֽחֻקִּ֗ים אֲשֶׁ֨ר צִוָּ֤ה יְהֹוָה֙ אֶת־מֹשֶׁ֔ה בֵּ֥ין אִ֖ישׁ לְאִשְׁתּ֑וֹ בֵּֽין־אָ֣ב לְבִתּ֔וֹ בִּנְעֻרֶ֖יהָ בֵּ֥ית אָבִֽיהָ׃ {פ}
commentary_links.english: Those are the laws that G<small>OD</small> enjoined upon Moses between a husband and his wife, and as between a father and his daughter while in her father’s household by reason of her youth.
commentary_links.matched_snippet: מ בנעריה בית אביה נפקא &star בזה יפה כח האב מכח

commentary_links.english: she leaves his household and becomes the wife of another man;
